title: Get asynchronous download tasks
content:
Use this endpoint to check whether the `BILLING_REPORT` task has completed. If the tasks have been completed, you will get the Excel file stream. Both Agency and Direct Business Centers are able to perform invoice related operations. > **Note**
Only users with Finance Manager or Finance Analyst permission can manage payments and invoices in a Business Center. You can use [/bc/member/invite/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739939455765505) and [/bc/member/update/](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1739696704424961) to configure or update access settings for members. ## Comparing v1.2 and v1.3 The following table outlines the differences between v1.2 and v1.3 endpoints. ```xtable |Changes{30%}|v1.2{35%}|v1.3{35%}| |---|---|---| |Endpoint path| /v1.2/bc/invoice/task/get/| /v1.3/bc/invoice/task/get/| |Request parameter data type|`bc_id`: number
`task_id`: number |`bc_id`: string
`task_id`: string| ``` ## Request **Endpoint** https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/task/get/ **Method** GET **Header** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |Access-Token {Required}|string|Authorized access token. For details, see [Authentication](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1738373164380162).| ``` **Parameters** ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |bc_id {Required}|string| Business Center ID. | |task_id {Required}|string| Task ID. | ``` ### Example ```xcodeblock (code curl http) curl --location --request GET https://business-api.tiktok.com/open_api/v1.3/bc/invoice/task/get/?bc_id={{bc_id}}&task_id={{task_id}} --header 'Access-Token: {{Access-Token}}' (/code) ``` ## Response ``` xtable |Field|Data Type|Description| |---|---|---| |code |number|Response code. For the complete list of response codes and descriptions, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |message |string|Response message. For details, see [Appendix - Return Codes](https://ads.tiktok.com/marketing_api/docs?id=1737172488964097).| |data |object|Returned data.| #|download_url|string|A url to download the task file. | #|status|string|Asynchronous download task status. Enum values: `FAILED`, `CREATED`, `RUNNING`, `SUCCEED`, `POLLING`. If the task is successfully completed, xlsx file streams will be in response.| #|error_msg|string|If the action failed, this field returns the error message.| |request_id |string|The log id of the request, which uniquely identifies a request. | ```
